text:
5.5 instant comes to ChatGPT today!

imo it is a pretty big upgrade, i really like using it.
RT @michpokrass: we shipped gpt-5.5 instant today to chat; it's rolling out over the next couple days to everyone. for this model, we focus…
i would like to talk to people who have built amazing things with 5.5 that weren't possible with earlier models. i am especially interested in examples that took ludicrous token budgets. thanks.

Google 为自家开源模型 Gemma 4 发布了 MTP drafter（多 token 预测草稿模型），推理速度最高提升 3 倍，输出质量保持不变。https://t.co/594HBijGWZ 

Gemma 4 是 Google 几周前发布的开源模型系列，从手机端的 E2B、E4B 一直到工作站的 26B MoE 和 31B Dense，官方称上线几周下载量已经突破 6000

OpenAI 把 ChatGPT 的默认模型升级成了 GPT-5.5 Instant，从今天开始替换原来的 GPT-5.3 Instant，全量推送给所有用户。

Instant 是 ChatGPT 里反应最快的日常档，几亿人每天都在用，这次升级针对的也是日常问答场景。

【1】幻觉显著减少

OpenAI
Elon can’t start a video game company because the name Xbox is taken

ElevenLabs is one of the most remarkable companies I've ever seen. 

There's lots of noise in the AI world, but they've relentlessly focused on execution - and are crushing it across research, engineering, product, and GTM.

Huge congrats to the team on this massive milestone 🥳

Full blog post is worth a read, but worth calling out: 

They grew from $350 million ARR at the end of 2025 to $500 million at the end of May 🤯

And they're hiring - https://t.co/dww2Jnw9re

We're thrilled to be investing in Tessera Labs.

Enterprise ERP transformations are one of the most painful and expensive undertakings in corporate IT.

Tessera is building the world's first AI-native system integrator for enterprise transformations, starting with SAP upgrades. https://t.co/EP4TOzGhNy

Tony James on Costco, Starbucks, Blackstone, and Charlie Munger

Tony James is an investor, Chairman of the Board at Costco, and former President and COO of Blackstone. In this conversation, he joins a16z GP David Haber for a conversation on scaling Blackstone from $14 billion to https://t.co/SFwrnpMIYV

(from "Claude 101") A simple eval approach

You don't need complex infrastructure to evaluate Claude. Here's a practical approach:

Gather examples. Collect 5-10 examples of a task you do regularly—emails you've written, reports you've created, analyses you've done.

Create test
